_comment: Prediction-engine weights, tuned per tour x surface by walk-forward log loss (data-pipeline/tuneWeights.js). Each match's SMASH probability = calibrate(ws*simProb + we*eloProb + wr*rankProb). rankProb(p1) = 1/(1+10^((log10(rankA)-log10(rankB))*rankScale)).
_calibrationComment: One-parameter Platt recalibration applied to the SMASH blend only: p' = sigmoid(a * logit(p)). The intercept is pinned at 0 by symmetry (which side is p1 is arbitrary), so a pick can never flip, only its stated confidence moves. a is refit per tour by tuneWeights.js on walk-forward out-of-fold predictions at every retune; a < 1 compresses overconfident tails. Replaced the hand-fit knee/factor tail shrink (validated equal-or-better in data-pipeline/experiments.js).
_eloComment: Elo hyperparameters, validated by walk-forward log loss (experiments.js): rho = weight on overall vs surface rating in the predicting blend (0.5 beat 0.65/0.8 on both tours); marginK scales rating updates by set dominance (straight-sets wins move ratings more than deciding-set escapes) and improved log loss on both tours.
